prompts.title: Serene Participant in Traditional Tea Ceremony
prompts.prompt: A serene, culturally authentic portrait of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are gracefully participating in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony, seated on a tatami mat in a minimalist tea room. The background features delicate shoji screens, subtle floral arrangements, bamboo accents, and low wooden furniture, creating an atmosphere of calm elegance. Soft natural light filters gently through the screens, casting diffuse highlights and subtle shadows that enhance textures of fabric, wood, and ceramics. Captured in a realistic cultural lifestyle photography style, emphasizing tranquility, mindfulness, and refined detail. Shallow depth of field focuses on the subject while softly blurring the background. Shot on a full-frame camera with a 50mm lens at f/1.8 aperture, producing creamy bokeh and sharp subject focus. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Afghan Traditional Attire
prompts.prompt: A culturally rich, hyper-realistic image of [Subject] with natural skin tones, expressive eyes, and neatly styled hair, featuring a well-groomed beard. The subject is dressed in traditional Afghan attire, wearing a clean, elegant perahan tunban with a textured waistcoat, ensuring a fully clothed and modest appearance. They are standing confidently in a traditional courtyard setting with classic Afghan architectural elements such as carved wooden doors, patterned tiles, and soft earth-toned walls. The environment includes subtle cultural details like woven textiles and handcrafted decor, creating an authentic and respectful atmosphere. Lighting is soft and natural with a warm golden tone, casting gentle shadows that enhance depth and fabric textures. Captured in a cinematic, documentary-style photography approach with a shallow depth of field, keeping the subject sharp while softly blurring the background. Shot on a full-frame camera with an 85mm lens at f/1.8 aperture for strong subject isolation and creamy bokeh. Ultra-high resolution, sharp focus, realistic textures, professional color grading. No nudity, no distortion, no extra limbs, no blur, no artifacts, no watermark, no text. 9:16 aspect ratio.
